001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus;
002
003import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.MessageProps;
007import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
008import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.ControlIQInfoV2Request;
009
010/**
011 * Response message for {@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.ControlIQInfoV2Request}, opCode -77, size 19
012 *
013 * <br>
014 *
015 * 
016 * <table border='1'>
017 * <caption>Message properties:</caption>
018 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>opCode</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>-77</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
019 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>size</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>19</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
020 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>type</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType#RESPONSE}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
021 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>request</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.ControlIQInfoV2Request}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
022 * </table>
023 */
024@MessageProps(
025    opCode=-77,
026    size=19,
027    type=MessageType.RESPONSE,
028    request=ControlIQInfoV2Request.class
029)
030public class ControlIQInfoV2Response extends ControlIQInfoAbstractResponse {
031    
032    private boolean closedLoopEnabled;
033    private int weight;
034    private int weightUnit;
035    private int totalDailyInsulin;
036    private int currentUserModeType;
037    private int byte6;
038    private int byte7;
039    private int byte8;
040    private int controlStateType;
041    private int exerciseChoice;
042    private long exerciseDuration;
043    private long exerciseTimeRemaining;
044
045    public ControlIQInfoV2Response() {}
046
047    public ControlIQInfoV2Response(boolean closedLoopEnabled, int weight, int weightUnit, int totalDailyInsulin, int currentUserModeType, int byte6, int byte7, int byte8, int controlStateType, int exerciseChoice, long exerciseDuration, long exerciseTimeRemaining) {
048        this.cargo = buildCargo(closedLoopEnabled, weight, weightUnit, totalDailyInsulin, currentUserModeType, byte6, byte7, byte8, controlStateType, exerciseChoice, exerciseDuration, exerciseTimeRemaining);
049        this.closedLoopEnabled = closedLoopEnabled;
050        this.weight = weight;
051        this.weightUnit = weightUnit;
052        this.totalDailyInsulin = totalDailyInsulin;
053        this.currentUserModeType = currentUserModeType;
054        this.byte6 = byte6;
055        this.byte7 = byte7;
056        this.byte8 = byte8;
057        this.controlStateType = controlStateType;
058        this.exerciseChoice = exerciseChoice;
059        this.exerciseDuration = exerciseDuration;
060        this.exerciseTimeRemaining = exerciseTimeRemaining;
061
062    }
063
064    /**
065     * <table border="1">
066     * <caption>Parsed fields for ControlIQInfoV2Response:</caption>
067     * <tr><td><code>closedLoopEnabled</code></td><td><code>raw[0] != 0</code></td></tr>
068     * <tr><td><code>weight</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readShort(raw, 1)</code></td></tr>
069     * <tr><td><code>weightUnit</code></td><td><code>raw[3]</code></td></tr>
070     * <tr><td><code>totalDailyInsulin</code></td><td><code>raw[4]</code></td></tr>
071     * <tr><td><code>currentUserModeType</code></td><td><code>raw[5]</code></td></tr>
072     * <tr><td><code>byte6</code></td><td><code>raw[6]</code></td></tr>
073     * <tr><td><code>byte7</code></td><td><code>raw[7]</code></td></tr>
074     * <tr><td><code>byte8</code></td><td><code>raw[8]</code></td></tr>
075     * <tr><td><code>controlStateType</code></td><td><code>raw[9]</code></td></tr>
076     * <tr><td><code>exerciseChoice</code></td><td><code>raw[10]</code></td></tr>
077     * <tr><td><code>exerciseDuration</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 11)</code></td></tr>
078     * <tr><td><code>exerciseTimeRemaining</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 15)</code></td></tr>
079     * </table>
080     */
081    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
082        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == props().size());
083        this.cargo = raw;
084        this.closedLoopEnabled = raw[0] != 0;
085        this.weight = Bytes.readShort(raw, 1);
086        this.weightUnit = raw[3];
087        this.totalDailyInsulin = raw[4];
088        this.currentUserModeType = raw[5];
089        this.byte6 = raw[6];
090        this.byte7 = raw[7];
091        this.byte8 = raw[8];
092        this.controlStateType = raw[9];
093        this.exerciseChoice = raw[10];
094        this.exerciseDuration = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 11);
095        this.exerciseTimeRemaining = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 15);
096
097    }
098
099    
100    /**
101     * <table border="1">
102     * <caption>Byte layout for ControlIQInfoV2Response.buildCargo(...):</caption>
103     * <tr><th>Offset</th><th>Description</th></tr>
104     * <tr><td>0</td><td><code>(byte) (closedLoopEnabled ? 1 : 0)</code></td></tr>
105     * <tr><td>1</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(weight) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
106     * <tr><td>2</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(weight) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
107     * <tr><td>3</td><td><code>(byte) weightUnit</code></td></tr>
108     * <tr><td>4</td><td><code>(byte) totalDailyInsulin</code></td></tr>
109     * <tr><td>5</td><td><code>(byte) currentUserModeType</code></td></tr>
110     * <tr><td>6</td><td><code>(byte) byte6</code></td></tr>
111     * <tr><td>7</td><td><code>(byte) byte7</code></td></tr>
112     * <tr><td>8</td><td><code>(byte) byte8</code></td></tr>
113     * <tr><td>9</td><td><code>(byte) controlStateType</code></td></tr>
114     * <tr><td>10</td><td><code>(byte) exerciseChoice</code></td></tr>
115     * <tr><td>11</td><td><code>toUint32(exerciseDuration) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
116     * <tr><td>12</td><td><code>toUint32(exerciseDuration) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
117     * <tr><td>13</td><td><code>toUint32(exerciseDuration) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
118     * <tr><td>14</td><td><code>toUint32(exerciseDuration) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
119     * <tr><td>15</td><td><code>toUint32(exerciseTimeRemaining) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
120     * <tr><td>16</td><td><code>toUint32(exerciseTimeRemaining) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
121     * <tr><td>17</td><td><code>toUint32(exerciseTimeRemaining) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
122     * <tr><td>18</td><td><code>toUint32(exerciseTimeRemaining) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
123     * </table>
124     */
125    public static byte[] buildCargo(boolean closedLoopEnabled, int weight, int weightUnit, int totalDailyInsulin, int currentUserModeType, int byte6, int byte7, int byte8, int controlStateType, int exerciseChoice, long exerciseDuration, long exerciseTimeRemaining) {
126        return Bytes.combine(
127            new byte[]{ (byte) (closedLoopEnabled ? 1 : 0) },
128            Bytes.firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(weight),
129            new byte[]{ (byte) weightUnit },
130            new byte[]{ (byte) totalDailyInsulin },
131            new byte[]{ (byte) currentUserModeType },
132            new byte[]{ (byte) byte6 },
133            new byte[]{ (byte) byte7 },
134            new byte[]{ (byte) byte8 },
135            new byte[]{ (byte) controlStateType },
136            new byte[]{ (byte) exerciseChoice },
137            Bytes.toUint32(exerciseDuration),
138            Bytes.toUint32(exerciseTimeRemaining));
139    }
140    
141    public boolean getClosedLoopEnabled() {
142        return closedLoopEnabled;
143    }
144    public int getWeight() {
145        return weight;
146    }
147    public int getWeightUnitId() {
148        return weightUnit;
149    }
150    public int getTotalDailyInsulin() {
151        return totalDailyInsulin;
152    }
153    public int getCurrentUserModeTypeId() {
154        return currentUserModeType;
155    }
156    public int getByte6() {
157        return byte6;
158    }
159    public int getByte7() {
160        return byte7;
161    }
162    public int getByte8() {
163        return byte8;
164    }
165    public int getControlStateType() {
166        return controlStateType;
167    }
168    public int getExerciseChoice() {
169        return exerciseChoice;
170    }
171    public long getExerciseDuration() {
172        return exerciseDuration;
173    }
174    public long getExerciseTimeRemaining() {
175        return exerciseTimeRemaining;
176    }
177
178}
